key_finding: Primary EC dataset. 6 Class A–C targets confirmed. ECSCR top hit (log2FC=2.85). 78-gene curated surface target list derived.
Independent EC validation. Confirms ECSCR, CD93, PLAUR, SEMA6D at Day 2. 4,885 sorted ECs.
Pericyte dataset. Confirms PLAUR, IFITM1, NT5E in pericytes. Cross-validates EC targets in NVU context.
Whole-brain confirmatory. 29/78 targets significant. HMOX1 highest FC (5.68 at 3D). ECSCR confirmed (log2FC=2.97).

deg_method: limma paired (p<0.05 nominal; n=6 too small for FDR)
key_finding: Human validation. SELE (log2FC=7.59, p=0.031) and ACKR1 (log2FC=8.25, p=0.023) confirmed in human stroke infarct.
